positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) leaping across a crescent moon, surrounded by bioluminescent flora and constellations. The fox should have elegant, flowing lines and a magical glow. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette contrasted with vibrant neon greens and warm gold highlights. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centralized, perfect for a chest print on apparel. Clean silhouette style, vector art feel, detailed line work, strong contrast, flat graphic design aesthetic, minimalist negative space.
negative: blurry, noise, low detail, text, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, logos, trademarks, celebrity, copyrighted, artist name, photo, realistic, grainy
